serviceNotes.engine oil: M57 EU Inspection schedule: Oil Service 15,000 km or 12 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2178-2001/service (330d 3.0 diesel).
serviceNotes.fuel filter: Changed from 60,000 km to 45,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2178-2001/service (E46 330d 3.0 diesel fuel filter).
serviceNotes.EGR / intake clean: Six-cylinder diesel EGR/intake soot. Cleaning when faults or poor response appear (~120,000 km planning).

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2178-2001/service — 15,000 km or 12 months (BMW 330d 3.0 diesel); BMW owner's manual E46 M57
serviceSources.micro filter: BMW owner's manual E46 (EU) — microfilter at Inspection II, 30,000 km
serviceSources.brake fluid: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake fluid every 24 months (DOT 4 LV)
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2178-2001/service — 30,000 km air filter (330d 3.0 diesel); BMW owner's manual E46 M57
serviceSources.fuel filter: Changed from 60,000 km to 45,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2178-2001/service (330d 3.0 diesel fuel filter)
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake pad inspection every 15,000 km with Oil Service
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake pad inspection every 15,000 km with Oil Service
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW owner's manual E46 (EU) — Inspection II / vehicle check 60,000 km
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: Haynes / ZF aftermarket — ATF exchange REC
serviceSources.manual gearbox fluid: Haynes BMW 3 Series — manual gearbox oil REC 100,000 km
serviceSources.xDrive transfer case fluid: Bimmerpost / workshop consensus — transfer case fluid REC 80,000 km (330xd)
serviceSources.differential fluids: Bimmerpost / workshop consensus — differential fluid REC 80,000 km (330xd)
serviceSources.coolant flush: https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2178-2001/service — coolant 60,000 km or 4 years OEM; REC extended flush 120,000 km
serviceSources.EGR / intake clean: Diesel workshop practice — EGR/intake cleaning; REC only
